reference: I have skin rashes that resemble poison oak, which is common where I live. However, I have been experiencing rashes off and on for over a month now in the same areas of my body. I have a severe itchy rash with blisters in the inner crease of my elbow, behind my neck, and behind my ears. It can't be poison oak after a month. I am a fifty-eight-year-old female who still has night sweats due to menopause.
text: タイムスケジュールが組め込みの道具なんだよ。小屋が雨ですぐに水浸しになることを思ってか、全てが完璧だ。最初で見る景色が美しくするだろう。どんなに長く構えても、ピクニック小屋でオオカミと会えるって験を積むんだぞ。
